qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Knowledge of computerized accounting work. Preference will be given to retired employees with experience in accounting work.
qualification.details: Assistant Accountant: Retired employees with knowledge of computerized accounting work. Preference will be given to retired employees with experience in accounting work.

salary_details.pay_scale: Net pension deducted from last drawn pay
salary_details.details: Salary will be equal to the amount received after deducting the net pension (if any before commutation) from the last drawn pay.

selection_process: Review of previous service record and character register Personal interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MACT Sambhal Assistant Accountant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MACT Sambhal सहायक लेखाकार Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MACT Sambhal सहायक लेखाकार Recruitment 2026 is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the सहायक लेखाकार post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired employees with knowledge of computerized accounting work. Preference will be given to those with prior experience in accounting roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the सहायक लेखाकार post is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. How will the salary be determined for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary will be calculated by deducting the net pension (if any before commutation) from the last drawn pay of the retired employee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the MACT Sambhal सहायक लेखाकार posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a review of the candidate's previous service record and character register, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the MACT Sambhal सहायक लेखाकार position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to send your completed application form along with required documents via registered post to the specified office address.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required with the application form?
faq.answer: You will need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, which typically include a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Motor Accident Claims Tribunal Sambhal located?
faq.answer: The Motor Accident Claims Tribunal Sambhal is located in Chandausi, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is on a contract basis.
